jobs.title: Director of Partnerships
jobs.snippet: Experience carrying a quota of over $5M+ in a partner capacity
jobs.fullDescription: Careers - Imubit Our Customers Product Industries Process Industries Cement & Building Materials Chemicals, Petrochemicals & Polymers Mining, Minerals & Metals Oil & Gas Sustainability Company Company Overview Leadership & Advisory Board Careers Resources News & Awards Events & Webinars Blog Get AIO Assessment Build your future here Careers at Imubit We are mission-driven to invent new technologies that help our clients transcend beyond the limits of what they considered possible. Our team includes globally-renowned Google-endorsed machine learning scientists, world-class hydrocarbon processing experts, and enterprise software seasoned professionals. Build the Future of Digital Innovation at Imubit We are an energetic group of engineers and professionals, all looking to use our talents and experience to innovate the future of technology and energy. What started out as a team of engineers with a dream to change the way AI transcends refineries has turned into a global team of engineers, scientists, and industry experts at the cutting edge of the AI industry. The impact of our work can be seen both in the growth of the company and through the millions of dollars we are saving refineries all over the world. Our company culture is collaborative, inclusive, and supportive. We work through challenges and overcome obstacles together. Here at Imubit, we work hard and we play hard. We share a belief in Imubit’s mission to invent new technologies that help our clients transcend beyond the limits of what they considered possible. We accomplish this with creativity, innovation, dedication, safety, and integrity. We are guided by our principles Our cultural principles enable us to build a company that builds inventions and uses them to transcend people, businesses, and industries. Teamwork Teamwork based on orchestration, trust and support. Passion Passion to collaborate, learn and create. Humility Continuous evolution through humility and iteration. Ownership Ownership over personal and company missions. Purpose Purpose-driven, globally-motivated, empowering leadership. Interested in working at Imubit? Send Us Your Resume See Our Benefits Kickstart Your AI Journey Prove the value of AI optimization at your plant—at no cost. topPicks.title: Alliance Director - HR Tech & Fintech Partnerships
topPicks.snippet: We are seeking a results-driven Alliance Director to lead and expand regional and global partnerships in the HR tech and fintech space.
